overall.description: Gameplay footage from a third-person perspective showing an armored character with a blue scarf exploring the interior of a gothic castle. The character ascends wooden staircases, enters a dormitory with bunk beds and blue curtains, and explores a large vintage bathroom with multiple sinks, bathtubs, and toilet stalls.

agents.ego_description: climbing wooden stairs and walking through narrow stone corridors with wall sconces

entered.detail: rough gray stone blocks forming the corridor walls
dark wooden stairs with carved railings
ornate carved wooden paneling along the lower walls
lit wall-mounted lantern providing warm light
doorway with blue fabric curtains at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wooden staircase within a narrow stone corridor. The walls feature ornate wooden wainscoting and lit wall sconces cast warm light on the gray stone. The character progresses upward through the enclosed castle architecture.

events.description: character opens wooden door and enters the bright dormitory room

agents.ego_description: entering the dormitory and looking around at the furnished interior with bunk beds

entered.detail: dark wooden bunk beds with white mattresses and blue drapes
heavy blue fabric curtains framing the windows and beds
tall arched window with diamond-patterned glass letting in daylight
tall dark wooden cabinet with paneled doors
blue patterned rug covering the wooden floor

segments.scene_description: The character enters a spacious dormitory room with blue carpet and tall gothic windows. Dark wooden bunk beds with blue curtains line the walls, and a large wardrobe stands near the entrance. Natural daylight mixes with the interior lighting as the character explores the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition stairwell between dormitory and bathroom

events.description: exits the dormitory into a darker enclosed stairwell
opens ornate wooden door and enters the bathroom

agents.ego_description: exiting the dormitory, descending a narrow wooden staircase, and approaching the bathroom entrance

entered.detail: steep wooden staircase descending into dim lighting
heavy carved wooden door with metal fixtures leading to bathroom

segments.scene_description: The character exits the dormitory into a darker, narrower stairwell with dim lighting. Descending the wooden stairs, the character approaches an ornate carved wooden door and opens it to enter the bathroom area.

scene_state.functional_zone: vintage castle bathroom with multiple fixtures

events.description: enters the large bathroom with row of sinks and stone pillars
character enters a green toilet stall and then exits back into the main bathroom area

agents.ego_description: exploring the bathroom, examining the row of vintage sinks, clawfoot bathtubs with curtains, and green toilet stalls

entered.detail: row of white porcelain sinks with silver faucets set into wooden vanities
large cylindrical stone column with red bands supporting the ceiling
patterned stone tile flooring in hexagonal shapes
vintage white bathtub with curved edges and wooden base
heavy fabric curtains around the bathing areas
large ornate mirror above a wooden dresser with lit candles
row of green painted wooden toilet stall doors with decorative trim

segments.scene_description: The character enters a spacious vintage bathroom with hexagonal tile floors and warm artificial lighting. The room features a row of porcelain sinks, stone pillars, clawfoot bathtubs with curtains, and green painted toilet stalls. The character explores the space, examining the vanity mirror with candles and briefly entering one of the toilet stalls before returning to the main area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through the interior of a gothic castle, moving from narrow stone corridors into a bright dormitory before descending into a vintage bathroom. It begins with the character ascending a wooden staircase within a narrow stone corridor illuminated by warm wall sconces. As the character reaches the top, the space opens into a spacious dormitory featuring blue carpets, dark wooden bunk beds with blue curtains, and tall gothic windows that let in natural daylight. The scene then shifts back into a dim, narrow stairwell where the character descends toward an ornate carved wooden door. Finally, the camera enters a large vintage bathroom with hexagonal tile floors, moving past porcelain sinks and clawfoot bathtubs toward green painted toilet stalls under warm artificial lighting.
